Joshua Brewer

Who am I?

My name is Joshua Brewer, and I like trees. I made this website mostly for fun, but also to share my faith. I am a member of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day saints. (formerly called the Mormons).

About Me

I started my mission on June 10th, 2026 and I'll come home around that time in two years. I chose to serve a mission because I believe in this faith and I truly think I will be able to help other people immensely and build my own skills.

Ciudad Juárez

See the map of where I'm going to be serving!
